analysis: The project currently has multiple HTML/CSS/JS files across different directories (test-website, docs, github-page) but lacks a cohesive black hole theme. The existing files contain incomplete or generic content. The theme should focus on cosmic visuals, dark backgrounds, animated black hole effects, and swirling patterns to create an immersive experience about black holes.

improvements.description: Update the CSS file to include a dark cosmic theme with black hole animations, swirling effects, glowing elements, and a cosmic color palette (deep purples, blues, blacks with bright star-like highlights).
Complete the HTML content to include sections about black holes, interactive animated slides showing black hole formation, event horizons, and related cosmic phenomena.
Enhance the JavaScript to add smooth animations for black hole visuals, interactive planet orbits, and mobile-friendly menu toggle functionality with proper event handlers.
Fix the SVG data URL for the black hole pattern to include proper SVG content with swirling cosmic designs and ensure it is correctly formatted.
Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon and ensure all sections are properly included for a seamless user experience.
